title: hoehnea minima
intro: Hoehnea minima, also known as Dwarf Hoehnea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Brazil. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Hoehnea minima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
